description: Style Note Updated summer style for your feet with catwalk's latest line. Inspired by the fresh fashion fetishes this season, this pair of sandals exemplify versatility - they look good with everything from smart formal day wear to breezy spring separates. Style them with an all-pastel coloured ensembles or a colour pop one, they go well with both! Product Description Plastic thong style straps that start at the midfoot with a soft plastic toe separator that has silica beading over floral printing on the straps Nubuck lining on the straps for durability and style and a padded synthetic leather footbed Durable TPU outsole with grooved patterns for grip and traction Heel with textured grooves for ergonomic comfort and style Material and Care Synthetic Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
